name: -e
--exit-status
options.description: Set exit status code based on the output

name: -s
--slurp
options.description: Read entire input stream into a large array and run the filter once

name: -S
--sort-keys
options.description: Output the fields of each object with the keys in sorted order

options.name: --indent
options.description: Use the given number of spaces for indentation

options.name: --slurpfile
options.description: Set variable $name to an array of JSON values read from the file

options.name: --rawfile
options.description: Set variable $name to a string consisting of the contents of the file

name: -n
--null-input
options.description: Do not read any input, use null as the single input value

name: -R
--raw-input
options.description: Parse each line of input as a string instead of JSON

name: -j
--join-output
options.description: Like -r but do not print a newline after each output

options.name: -f
options.description: Read filter from the specified file

options.name: --jsonargs
options.description: Remaining arguments are JSON values used as positional arguments

options.name: --args
options.description: Remaining arguments are string values used as positional arguments
